name: tiber
description: Git-backed task boards for coding agents: shared cross-worktree task tracking, tiber CLI, stdio MCP, dry-run-first scaffold previews, validation, and read-only dashboard workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Git-backed shared task tracking for agent workflows.
interface.longDescription: Use Tiber when a user asks for repository task tracking, shared agent task state across worktrees, task creation, task ordering, validation, sync conflict handling, setup/scaffold guidance, or no-follow-up setup sequencing. It provides a tiber CLI, stdio MCP entry point, dry-run-first repo scaffolding, and source-included Rust implementation for deterministic task creation, ordering, validation, and read-only dashboard workflows. Plugin install and session start are non-mutating. For repo integration files, even when the user asks for no follow-up questions, run or recommend only tiber scaffold repo --dry-run, preview .gitignore, hook/workflow snippets, and optional just show-tasks changes, then stop until explicit approval of that preview.
defaultPrompt: Track repository tasks across worktrees with tiber.
Set up tiber in this repository with a dry-run scaffold preview first.
Use tiber to create, order, and validate repository tasks.
